343-984-5332
 1990, RUSSELL ROAD, K1G 4J7, OTTAWA, ON
HOME
OB&O MENU
DAVE’S BAR
ABOUT US
FROM THE CHEF
CATERING
CAREERS
CAREERS

NOW HIRING:

Who we are: OB&O’s is a local family owned restaurant specializing in African and Caribbean cuisine. As we re-open, we are looking for a team of dynamic individuals to help foster our values of authenticity, flavor and culture. We hope to develop staff experience by providing culinary learning opportunities in a fun and fast paced environment.  To apply, email funmiobando@gmail.com with your resume or call 613-799-9459. We are looking to fill three roles;

Line cook (Full-time):

Qualifications:

Minimum 2 years of culinary experience
Food Handling Certificate

Salary and Benefits: 17.50 – 18.50. 15% off orders.

Duties and responsibilities:

Work cooperatively with others, by treating other staff members with respect and integrity
Supports head chef by grilling, frying, sautéing and preparing specified recipes
Portion food products prior to cooking according to restaurant portion sizes and recipe specifications.
Daily preparation of sauces, meats, and cultural foods
Maintains a clean and safe working environment.
Leads the team in the absence of the head chef

Prep Cook (Full-time/part-time)

Salary: 16.50 – 17.25. 10% off orders

Qualifications:

Minimum 2 years of culinary experience
Food Handling Certificate

Duties and Responsibilities

Prepares food items by cutting, chopping, mixing, and preparing sauces.
Work cooperatively with
